title: Diamond Power Infrastructure Gets Rs 43.26 Crore Order from Adani Power Limited - scanx.trade
content:
Diamond Power Infrastructure Gets Rs 43.26 Crore Order from Adani Power Limited
Diamond Power Infrastructure Limited has received a Letter of Intent worth Rs. 43.26 crores from Adani Power Limited for supplying power and control cables to the Raipur Ph-II Thermal Power Projects in Chhattisgarh. The comprehensive contract covers design, engineering, manufacturing, testing, and delivery services with completion scheduled by July 31, 2026, strengthening the company's position in the power infrastructure sector.
*this image is generated using AI for illustrative purposes only.
Diamond Power Infrastructure Limited has secured a substantial order from Adani Power Limited, marking a significant business development for the cable manufacturing company. The Letter of Intent, disclosed under SEBI regulations, represents a major contract win in the power infrastructure sector with execution scheduled by July 31, 2026.
Order Details and Scope
The comprehensive order encompasses multiple aspects of cable supply and services for Adani Power's thermal power project. The contract includes design, engineering, manufacturing, inspection and testing at manufacturer's works, packing and forwarding, transit insurance, transportation and supply of various sizes of power and control cables.
Contract Specifications
The order specifically covers the supply of various sizes of power and control cables for the Raipur Ph-II Thermal Power Projects located in Chhattisgarh. This domestic contract represents a significant addition to Diamond Power Infrastructure's order book, with the company responsible for the complete supply chain from manufacturing to final delivery.
Regulatory Compliance
The company has confirmed that the order does not fall under related party transactions and that no promoter, promoter group, or group companies have any interest in Adani Power Limited. This ensures the transaction maintains arm's length commercial terms and complies with corporate governance requirements.
Business Impact
The Rs. 43.26 crore order strengthens Diamond Power Infrastructure's position in the power cable supply sector. With a completion timeline extending to July 2026, the contract provides revenue visibility and demonstrates the company's capability to handle large-scale thermal power project requirements. The comprehensive scope of services, from design to delivery, showcases the company's integrated manufacturing and supply capabilities.
